channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: MCP servers: real-time pipelines without agents
item.description: Cut real-time pipeline latency 60% with Redis 7.2 — COBOL copybook ingestion, EBCDIC-to-JSON conversion, and 130 ms median latency without Kafka or Flink.

item.title: WASM ML models: keep dev speed at the edge
item.description: Cut edge deployment time 95% with WASM inference engines — keep Python tooling, ship 11MB artifacts, and slash cold starts from 47s to 1.8s on Jetson Orin Nano

item.title: CI/CD for Django in 20ms Africa networks
item.description: Cut Django CI/CD build time 88% in African clouds — 90s builds, 78% egress savings, and the registry mirror trick most tutorials miss.

item.title: Ship logs at 50k EPS: OpenTelemetry, Fluent Bit, ClickHouse
item.description: Cut log pipeline costs 60% with OpenTelemetry 1.30, Fluent Bit 2.2, and ClickHouse 23.10 — 50k EPS benchmark and the tuning mistakes I made first

item.title: Big model API vs fine-tune: the 2026 math
item.description: I’ve seen teams burn six weeks perfecting a prompt only to hit a 12% drop in accuracy when their top user started asking questions in German.

item.title: AI solo SaaS 2026: build vs buy
item.description: Cut solo SaaS costs 90% with AI in 2026 — build vs buy stacks compared with real numbers, 3 concrete bench

item.title: JSON mode's hidden costs revealed
item.description: Cut LLM API costs 49% and errors 91% with extraction + correction pipeline — how we stopped fighting JSON mode and started using LLMs correctly

item.title: Pair programming with AI: 5 hard lessons in 2026
item.description: Cut PR review time 46% with Cursor 0.34 and team rules — acceptance rate, latency, and cost per engineer in 2026’s real-world experiment.

item.title: Why I picked Playwright and Vitest in 2026
item.description: Cut frontend test time 37% and CI cost 38% with Playwright 1.46 and Vitest 1.6 — the real migration guide teams need in 2026

item.title: Defend LLM apps: OWASP flaws decoded
item.description: Secure LLM apps with OWASP Top 10 LLM flaws — 91% injection reduction, concrete Python code, and Azure Content Safety 2026 integration

item.title: Launch SaaS in 6 weeks: the AI shortcut I actually used
item.description: Ship in 6 weeks: how AI tools built 80% of a SaaS for under $500 — real metrics, failures, and the exact stack that worked for Lagos users on 2G

item.title: Prompt injection’s hidden AWS tax
item.description: Cut LLM costs 40% by blocking prompt injection — sandboxing, schema validation, and the retry storm mistake most teams miss.

item.title: Serve 4G-as-baseline apps in 2026
item.description: Cut API response time 21% and payload 63% for 4G-as-baseline users — Go server, Redis 7.4, and Vite 5.3 steps with real 2026 latency and cost data.

item.title: Nigeria’s 2026 API rules broke our microservices
item.description: Cut API compliance risk 8% with transaction boundaries — why Nigeria’s 2026 PSMR rules broke microservices and what to do instead

item.title: AI code 40% — how to keep it from rotting your repo
item.description: Cut AI debt 40% with ruff 0.5.4 — the free linter that catches Cursor and Copilot mistakes in 5 minutes

item.title: AI apps break your stack — here’s the fix
item.description: Cut 800ms API latency to 180ms in production systems — the stateful architecture patterns 2026 teams actually use (Python 3.11, Redis 7.2, SQLite 3.45, vLLM 0.4.2).

item.title: Audit AI code: onboarding without the burn
item.description: Cut onboarding time 44% with AI-guided walkthroughs — but human guides still win for trust and MTTR. Real benchmarks, tools, and the mistake most teams make first.

item.title: 47% AI code debt in 2026
item.description: Cut AI code debt 80% with automated guardrails — performance, cost, and DX comparison with Semgrep 1.51, Rego, and real 2026 benchmarks.

item.title: AI UI generation: what it fixed and what still breaks
item.description: Cut frontend work 40–60% with AI UI generation tools — real wins, hidden Safari CORS bugs, and the exact prompts that paid off in 2026.

item.title: Debug async Python before it deadlocks…
item.description: Cut async Python bugs 60% by choosing trio over threads — concrete benchmarks, real outage stories, and version-pinned tools (Python 3.11, trio 0.24)
